children.#dim: Full length of loco: 96px long (6 blocks), 32px wide (2 blocks), 28px tall
children.#note: Runs from Z=0 (front cowcatcher end) to Z=96 (rear of cab)
children.name: boiler

children.#: === SMOKEBOX / FRONT FACE (circular end cap look) ===
children.name: smokebox

children.#dim: 4px wide, 14px tall, sits on top of boiler ~Z=12
children.name: smokestack

children.#dim: The engineer cab at the rear. 48px wide (3 blocks), 4 blocks tall.
children.#seat: Seat will be inside here at Z=74-94, rider sits at Z~80
children.name: cab_body

attachmentpoints.#: Rider mount point — 1 block behind seat front, at seated height
Click target for mounting — slightly higher for easy selection

children.#dim: Angled v-shape at front. Two wedge boxes.
children.name: cowcatcher_left

children.#dim: Steam loco drive wheels are big — ~20px diameter. 3 axles along boiler.
children.name: wheel_drive_L1

children.#: === CONNECTING ROD (left side, links drive wheels) ===
children.name: connecting_rod_L

children.#: === STEAM CYLINDER / VALVE CHEST (front of boiler, both sides) ===
children.name: cylinder_L

children.#: === CAB STEPS (rear left & right, for boarding) ===
children.name: step_L_bottom
